message:
🐛 Fix LLM-d stack discovery to find all stacks via Deployment-based detection (#670)

Stack discovery was limited to pods with llm-d.ai/role labels and InferencePool
CRDs, missing workloads that lack explicit labels. Added Deployment-based broad
discovery using name/namespace/label patterns (matching useLLMdServers approach),
increased kubectl timeouts from 15s to 30s to prevent timeout cascades with
concurrent WebSocket slots, and updated default monthly token limit to 500M.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@ const LOCAL_AGENT_URL = 'http://127.0.0.1:8585'
 const POLL_INTERVAL = 30000 // Poll every 30 seconds
 
 const DEFAULT_SETTINGS = {
-  limit: 5000000, // 5M tokens (realistic for Claude usage)
+  limit: 500000000, // 500M tokens monthly default
   warningThreshold: 0.7, // 70%
   criticalThreshold: 0.9, // 90%
   stopThreshold: 1.0, // 100%
